rows.label: qev075302_MSG0002
rows.name:
Th-They took Master's directly taught Zang Crush
and are still fine... what tough guys![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075302_MSG0003
rows.name:
This is bad, this is bad!
I'm going to get eaten at this rate![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075302_MSG0005
rows.name:
Earthling! Those guys took my Zang Crush
and are pretty weakened![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075302_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'll leave the rest to you!
Put them out of their misery![ST:wait ]
